creator: rafael.krug@zero-defect.com.br
text:
After Installing the FREEBSD on a VMWARE machine, and then trying to install the X-Org + Xfce4 from ports, while compiling the port /usr/port/audio/cdparanoid, the port crashes showing the following error:


Scsi_intefarce.c 969.c: error: 'struct scsi_sense_data' has no member named 'add_sense_code_qual'

gmake[2] *** [scsi_interface.o] Error 1

after that, the gmake quits the Xfce4 compiling path.

Fix: 

I didn't see any port option on /var/db/ports/. I think that the problem in in the port.
How-To-Repeat: If you try to install the port without xfce4 the problem occur again.
